For Airbnb hosts

Stop handing Airbnb 15% of every booking.

We build hosts a simple direct-booking website, synced live with your Airbnb calendar, so repeat guests, friends, and referrals can book straight with you. Lower price for them, more money for you, no extra hassle.

Via Airbnb
$300 booked
− $45 Airbnb fee (15%)
You keep $255
VS
Via your website
$285 booked
$0 platform fee
You keep $285. Guest saves $15
Same night, better outcome for both sides. Direct bookings just need somewhere to happen. That somewhere is your website.
3 live builds inside →

Why it's worth doing

Keep more per booking

No 15% fee on direct traffic. Repeat guests and referrals book you straight.

More affordable for guests

Pass along part of the savings so your rate beats Airbnb's, an easy reason to come back.

You own the relationship

Your brand, your guest list, your reviews. Not rented space on someone else's platform.

Still fully synced with Airbnb

Keep listing there too. The two calendars just talk to each other automatically.

Hassle-free by design

01

Live two-way calendar sync

Book on Airbnb or your site, both update instantly. No double-bookings.

02

Instant booking + payment

Guests check availability and pay on the spot, straight into your bank account.

03

Automatic confirmations

Booking details and check-in reminders go out on their own.

04

Built for repeat guests

Give your best guests a one-click reason to skip Airbnb next time.
